speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: taaki khandaan ki shanti bani rahe
text: Main apni saari khwahishein andar daba leti hoon taaki khandaan ki shanti bani rahe. Doctor ne phir stress bol kar baat taal di, par main unhe kaise samjhaun ki career gap ke baad ab saas kehti hain ki bahu ko sirf ghar sambhalna chahiye. Main unse behes nahi karti kyunki joint family mein kalesh hoga toh Mummy-Papa ki izzat mitti mein mil jayegi. Aur log ye na kahein ki ladki ko sanskar nahi diye. Andar hi andar itni suffocation ho rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used Lens C to mirror the relational burden of burying her desires to prevent conflict in her joint family and protect her parents' honor.
text: Tumhara apni khwahishon ko dabana sirf isliye taaki joint family mein koi kalesh na ho, dikhata hai ki tum apne parents ki izzat aur in rishton ko kitni ahmiyat de rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: taaki khandaan ki shanti bani rahe
text: Ahmiyat toh deni padti hai na. Joint family mein ek chhoti si baat ka bhi bada kalesh ban jata hai. Mera career gap waise hi itna lamba ho gaya hai, resume dekhti hoon toh saas taane deti hain. Main bas chup rehti hoon taaki khandaan ki shanti bani rahe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used Lens D to mirror the prolonged duration of her career gap and the continuous daily endurance of taunts.
text: Itne lambe samay se ek lamba career gap chal raha hai aur uske upar roz taane sunkar chup rehna, yeh rozana ka bojh uthana bahut thaka dene wala lagta hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thak hi gayi hoon. Pehle MNC mein kaam karti thi, aur ab poora din sirf kitchen aur ghar ke kaamon mein nikal jata hai. Kabhi lagta hai ki main apne liye kuch karun, par phir wahi darr ki ghar ka mahaul kharab hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asked a question reflecting on the transition from working to homemaking and how she manages the fear of conflict daily.
text: Pehle ek working professional hone se lekar ab apna poora waqt sirf ghar ke kaamon ko dene ke beech, jo darr mahaul kharab hone ka hai, uske sath tum khud ko roz kaise mana leti ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Khud ko bas yahi bolkar mana leti hoon ki yahi mera sanskar hai. Bahu hone ka yahi matlab hai shayad. Par jab purane colleagues ke LinkedIn updates dekhti hoon toh ek ajeeb si chubhan hoti hai. Phir wahi suffocation.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used Lens E to mirror the implied fear that trying to reconnect with her professional world would cost her family peace.
text: Aisa lag raha hai jaise tumhe darr ho ki agar tumne LinkedIn wale un sapnon ki taraf dubara mudkar dekha, toh uski keemat tumhari family ki shanti aur izzat se chukani padegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul wahi keemat hai. Main unko disappoint nahi kar sakti. Parents ne shaadi isliye thodi na ki thi ki unki beti roz saas se lade. Main unka sar neecha nahi karna chahti, chahe meri khud ki pehchaan khatam kyun na ho jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used Lens B to mirror how she frames her deep personal loss purely as an act of duty towards her parents and family.
text: Ek aagyakari beti aur samajhdar bahu ka farz nibhane ke liye, tumne apni khud ki pehchaan aur zarooraton ko bilkul peeche chhod dene ka tay kar liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Tay toh nahi tha, bas apne aap hota gaya. Ab dekho na, mujhe apna kaam bhi dobara shuru karna hai aur family ko bhi bacha kar rakhna hai. In dono ke beech main bilkul akeli pad gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflected the core feeling of ISOLATION arising from Gender Role conflict and Relational Preservation.
text: Tumhari in sab baaton ko sun kar mujhe lagta hai ki tum is waqt ek gahri ISOLATION mehsoos kar rahi ho, jahan tumhe samajhne wala ya tumhare career gap ke dard ko dekhne wala koi nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi me, koi nahi samajhta. Husband bhi kehte hain ki zaroorat kya hai job ki, sab kuch toh hai ghar mein. Unko lagta hai job sirf paise ke liye hoti hai, izzat ya pehchaan ke liye nahi. Unpe toh mujhe kabhi kabhi bahut gussa aata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validated her anger at her husband as natural in the context of the Hindi Belt's joint family expectations, separating her worth from their judgments.
text: Husband ka support na milne par gussa aana bilkul jayaz aur samajh aane wali baat hai. Aksar humari society aur joint families mein yeh maan liya jata hai ki aurat ki pehchaan sirf uske ghar sambhalne se hai, par iska yeh matlab nahi ki tumhari professional identity ki koi keemat nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: taaki khandaan ki shanti bani rahe
text: Wahi toh baat hai. Main gussa dikha bhi toh nahi sakti unhe. Thodi der pehle bhi jab unhone wahi baat repeat ki, toh maine topic change kar diya taaki khandaan ki shanti bani rahe. Par andar toh ek gubaar sa phat raha tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Disclosed a systemic pattern to normalize how women in joint families suppress their career dreams under the pressure of maintaining peace.
text: Working aurton ke saath humari aisi joint families mein yeh pattern bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki sab 'bahu' hone ke pressure mein apne gusse aur sapno dono ko daba deti hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, sab adjust kar leti hain toh mujhe lagta hai main kyun itna complain kar rahi hoon. Lekin ab mujhse ghar ke daily kalesh se darr lagne laga hai. Main mentally aur physically thak gayi hoon yahi soch soch kar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used Lens D to mirror the toll that continuously fearing conflict and overthinking takes on her body and mind.
text: Har roz is kalesh ke darr mein jeena aur apne andar ke us gubaar ko lagatar chupana, tumhare dimaag aur shareer dono ki himmat ko buri tarah tod raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thik kaha aapne. Main shayad ek boori aurat hoon jo apne pariwaar se zyada apne resume aur purane career ke baare mein sochti hai. Padosi aur biradari wale bhi yahi kahenge ki dekho kaisi bahu hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used Lens C to respond to the stigma cue with a shorter restatement, ending with a soft pause.
text: Apne purane kaam ko yaad karne par khud ko boori aurat samajhna, aur logon ke taano ke darr se khud par doubt karna bhaari lag raha hoga...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Mujhe lagatar guilt feel hota hai. Par mujhe ye sab theek karna hai. Main khud ko khona nahi chahti. Koi raasta hai kya jisse main apne career ke bare me thoda aage badh sakun bina kalesh kiye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Suggested two small, completable actions that fit within her current role and boundaries without triggering conflict.
text: Zaroor, hum kuch chhote kadam try kar sakte hain. Ek option hai ki tum din mein sirf 10 minute nikal kar apne domain ki koi choti si online reading shuru karo bina kisi ko bataye. Doosra yeh ki apne resume ko dheere-dheere paper par likh kar format karo apne free time mein. Tumhe in dono mein se kya aasan lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Online reading wala thik lag raha hai. Mobile toh mere paas hota hi hai kitchen mein bhi. Usme main 10-15 minute apne field ka kuch padh sakti hoon, usse kisi ka koi nuksaan nahi hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walked her step-by-step through the chosen suggestion to make it highly actionable for today.
text: Pehle yeh karo ki apne phone browser mein ek aisi site bookmark kar lo jo tumhare kaam se judi ho… phir kal kitchen mein jab time mile toh bas ek article padh lena… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh main kar sakti hoon. Isse kisi ko shak bhi nahi hoga aur kalesh ka darr bhi nahi rahega. Lekin kya isse sach me mera career gap bharega ya bas mujhe accha lagega?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provided a systemic reframe on how small structural steps preserve professional connection amidst social pressure.
text: Kabhi-kabhi social structures aur joint family ke dabaav mein hume lagta hai ki hume ek saath badi chhalaang lagani hogi, par asal mein chhote kadam lena ek bahut practical tareeka hai apne dimag ko profession se connect rakhne ka jab tak sahi waqt na aa jaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh sahi bola aapne. Mujhe bas apna connection wapas feel karna hai apne kaam se. Saas ki baatein utni chubhengi nahi agar mere paas din me 10 minute apna khud ka kuch hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used Lens B to mirror how she strategically balances her duty to family peace with stealing a moment for herself.
text: Family ki shanti banaye rakhne ki zimmedari ke beech, din ka ek chhota sa hissa chupchap khud ke liye churana, tumhara is mushkil situation mein ek samajhdari bhara balance hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: taaki khandaan ki shanti bani rahe
text: Compromise karna hi toh sikhaya hai humein. Taaki khandaan ki shanti bani rahe. But this time, yeh compromise mere apne liye hai. Mujhe thoda theek feel ho raha hai yeh soch kar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asked a question to help her explore the positive meaning of this new boundary.
text: Yeh soch kar ki yeh chhota sa kadam specifically tumhare apne liye hai, tum us 10 minute ke samay ko kis roop mein dekhti ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Main us time ko apni choti si safe duniya manungi. Usme na koi saas hongi, na koi taane, aur na hi koi expectations. Bas main aur meri purani pehchaan.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used Lens C to mirror the relational separation she is creating to find peace with her identity.
text: Sabke expectations aur taano ki duniya se thoda alag hat kar, apni knowledge aur pehchaan ke saath ek chota sa, safe rishta banana tumhe sukoon de raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot sukoon de raha hai. Maine toh socha tha ki ya toh mujhe family chhodni padegi ya apna resume hamesha ke liye bhoolna padega. Main extreme binaries me soch rahi thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe about how society forces binaries on women, and how she is navigating them cleverly.
text: Society aksar hum auraton ke samne aisi binaries rakhti hai — ya toh achhi bahu bano ya career-oriented — par asal mein, tum bina kisika bura kiye apne kaam ki jhalak apne routine mein zinda rakh sakti ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you for validating this. Main khud ko itna akele samjh rahi thi is situation mein. Log kya kahenge is dar se maine apni best friend se bhi baat nahi ki is baare mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used Lens E to mirror the fear of judgment that caused her to isolate herself from friends.
text: Dusre logon ki baton ka darr is hadd tak gehra tha ki tumne khud ko apne sabse kareebi doston se bhi kaat liya taaki unhe family ki conflicts ka kuch pata na chale.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aur maine kal raat apne resume wale folder ko mobile me hide kar diya taaki galti se kisi ko dikh na jaye. Ab main thoda theek mehsoos kar rahi hoon aapse baat karke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validated her hiding of the resume as a survival tactic in joint families.
text: Resume chupa kar rakhne ki majboori aur yeh sab akela sehna, ye sab joint family wale mahaul mein peace maintain karne ki zaroorat se aata hai, aur main tumhari is baatcheet mein himmat dikhane ki sach me daad deti hoon.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapki baat sunkar sach me thodi himmat aayi hai. Main kal morning se kitchen mein 10 minute apne liye nikalungi jaise decide kiya hai. Yeh ek achi shuruwat lag rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Used Lens D to mirror the start of a new, positive routine tomorrow morning.
text: Kal subah ke wo 10 minute jab tum sach mein apni pehchaan ke liye shuru karogi, toh wahi se dhire dhire tumhara apne andar ka confidence wapas judna start ho jayega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: meri wajah se sasural mein kisi ka sar jhuke
text: Doctor ko lagta hai ki ye bas stress hai, par unhe kya pata ki har din apni identity kho kar ek 'achi bahu' banne ka natak karna kitna bhari padta hai. Main naukri wapas shuru karne ki zid nahi karti kyunki divorce stigma ka darr hai aur main nahi chahti ki meri wajah se sasural mein kisi ka sar jhuke. Sabka maan rakhne ke liye main chupchap chula-chauka sambhalti hoon, chahe andar se main khatam ho rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to mirror her relational helplessness and sacrifice for the family's image, ending with a soft pause to honor the stigma cue.
text: Tum sabka maan banaye rakhne ki itni koshish kar rahi ho, taaki tumhari wajah se sasural mein kisi ko nicha na dekhna pade...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: meri wajah se sasural mein kisi ka sar jhuke
text: Haan, kyunki agar maine awaz uthayi toh baat bigad jayegi. Biradari mein kya kahenge log? Mere maa-baap ki izzat bhi toh judi hai isme. Bas is darr se ki kahin rishta na toot jaye, main meri wajah se sasural mein kisi ka sar jhuke, aisa koi kaam nahi karna chahti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror the feared consequence of society blaming her parents if she asserts her rights.
text: Yeh baat andar hi andar ghabrahat deti hai ki tumhare ek kadam se tumhare apne maa-baap aur sasural walon ki izzat par sawal uth sakte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai meri padhai, mera career sab bekar ho gaya. Par saas kehti hain ki ghar ki bahu bahar dhakke khaye, ye hamari shaan ke khilaf hai. Chula-chauka hi meri poori duniya ban gayi hai ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking a gentle question about how she manages the heavy emotional toll of sacrificing her career for the family's pride.
text: Jab roj is ummeed ke sahare jeena padta hai ki tumhari qurbani se sabki shaan bani rahegi, toh is sab ke beech tum apne in emotions ko kaise sambhalti ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sambhal kahan paati hoon. Bas andar hi andar ghutan hoti hai. Rone ka mann karta hai par aansu chhupa leti hoon, kyunki kisi ko is ghar mein meri awaz sunayi nahi deti. Main bas ek achi bahu ka farz nibha rahi hoon, par apne aap se poori tarah cut off ho gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the core conflict of ISOLATION (C6 + Relational Preservation) as she describes her silent tears and loss of self.
text: Lagta hai ki is achi bahu ke dhache mein fit hone ki koshish mein, tum ek bahut hi gahre akelepan aur isolation se guzar rahi ho, jahan tumhara wajood bilkul kho sa gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: meri wajah se sasural mein kisi ka sar jhuke
text: Akelapan hi toh hai. Jab sab aas paas hote hain family mein, tab bhi akeli lagti hoon. Meri kitni iccha thi ki main dobara career shuru karun, par divorce ka thought aate hi rooh kaanp jaati hai. Meri wajah se sasural mein kisi ka sar jhuke, yeh main hone nahi de sakti, chahe mujhe khud ko mitaana pade.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her isolation in the cultural context of women being forced to choose between identity and family honor.
text: Yeh darr aur akelapan mehsoos karna poori tarah swabhavik hai, khaas kar hamare samaj mein jahan auraton ko apne sapno aur sasural ki izzat ke beech kisi ek ko chunne par majboor kiya jata hai, is mushkil phase mein tumhari niyat bilkul saaf hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapki baat sunkar thoda halka lag raha hai. Par kya sach mein women ka yahi naseeb hota hai? Mere parents ne itna invest kiya meri padhai par, sirf is din ke liye ki main saari zindagi chupchap sabki sewa karun aur apna talent bhool jaun?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a brief systemic anecdote to normalize the hidden cost of the 'achi bahu' role on women's identities.
text: Nayi shaadi-shuda zindagi mein apne sapnon ko maar kar sirf gharwalon ke hisaab se jeena bahut common hai—sirf tumhara akele ka dukh nahi hai, lekin koi is par khul kar bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein aurat ke chup rehne ko hi uska sabse bada sanskar maana jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, chup rehne ko hi sanskaar kehte hain yahan. Par ab andar gussa bhi aata hai kabhi kabhi. Mere husband ko bhi meri in feelings se koi farak nahi padta. Wo bhi apni family ki so-called 'izzat' ko meri khushi se upar rakhte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to softly reframe her near-anger back into the unequal duty and impossible relational burden she carries.
text: Ghar ka mahol aur rishte banaye rakhne ki saari duty sirf tumhare kandhon par daal di gayi hai, jiske chalte in halaat mein tumhari apni khushi aur awaz ki jagah bahut choti hoti ja rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha, saari duty meri hi hai. Par ab main thak chuki hoon is duty se. Pata nahi kitne din aur aise ghut-ghut kar jee paungi. Mujhe apne liye kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka, koi raasta hai kya is akelapan se bahar aane ka bina kalesh kiye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering two small, manageable steps that respect her relational boundaries while providing a moment of personal space.
text: Is ghutan se aage badhne ki tumhari chahat sach mein bahut himmat wali hai. Hum do chote kadam soch sakte hain. Pehla, kya tum din mein sirf 10 minute apne purane job ke notes ya koi personal dairy akele padh sakti ho? Ya doosra, jab sab log aaram kar rahe ho, toh balcony mein baith kar apni pasand ka kuch sun sakti ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Diary nikal kar padhne mein toh darr lagega ki kisi ne dekh liya toh kya sochenge. Par dopehar ko jab saas so rahi hoti hain, tab main 10 minute terrace par jaakar apne earphone mein purane favourite songs sun sakti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking her through the execution of the terrace and music step to ensure it feels safe and concrete.
text: Yeh bilkul theek rahega. Pehle aaj dopehar jab ghar mein poori shanti ho, toh dheere se terrace par jaana... phir apne earphone lagakar sirf 10 minute apni pasand ke gaane sunna... bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: meri wajah se sasural mein kisi ka sar jhuke
text: Haan, itna main aaram se kar sakti hoon. Isse kisi ko shak bhi nahi hoga aur thoda time khud ke liye mil jayega. Par phir jab wapas neeche aungi rasoi mein, wahi purana darr satae ga ki meri wajah se sasural mein kisi ka sar jhuke, aise taane aur rules phir se face karne padenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a systemic reframe on how the fear of 'izzat' is used as a control mechanism over women, normalizing her ongoing anxiety.
text: Neeche aane par darr wapas aana samajh aata hai, kyunki yeh chula-chauka aur izzat ka darr ek patriarchy ka hissa hai jo auraton ko control mein rakhne ke liye banaya gaya hai, aur is dhache mein tumhari yeh ghabrahat bilkul jayaz hai, isme tumhari koi personal kami nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Control... aapne ekdum sahi point pakda hai. Unhe asal darr is baat ka hai ki agar main independent ho gayi toh unka control mere upar se hat jayega. Izzat toh bas ek bahana hai. Aur itne waqt se main khud ko hi dosh de rahi thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to mirror the duration of her self-blame and the new clarity she has found.
text: Itne lambe arse tak tum khud ko is parampara mein galat mehsoos karti rahi, aur ab aakar tumhe saaf dikh raha hai ki darr izzat ka nahi, balki tumhari azaadi ka hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji, dhire dhire aankhein khul rahi hain. Mujhe lagta tha ki main aur compromise karungi toh sab theek ho jayega aur mujhe respect milegi. But ab samajh aa raha hai ki chahe main kitna bhi jhuk jaun, unki expectations aur rules kabhi khatam nahi hongi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reassuring her that gaining this deep understanding of her situation is a massive step, separating her worth from the endless family expectations.
text: Apne baare mein itni gahri samajh rakhna aasaan nahi hota, khaas kar tab jab humare samaj mein aadarsh bahu ka bojh itna bada ho, aisi jagah par aakar apne haq aur azaadi ki keemat ko pehchanna hi apne aap mein ek bahut badi jeet hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main ekdum se toh job nahi shuru kar sakti, warna roz naye taane aur kalesh honge ghar mein. Par main kam se kam apni skill ko zinda toh rakh sakti hoon internet ke through. Mujhe apna dimag wapas kisi constructive cheez mein lagana hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens E to mirror how she is cleverly avoiding the feared consequence of conflict while safely taking a step for her identity.
text: Ghar mein hone wale kisi bade bawaal ya kalesh se bachte hue, tum ek bahut hi samajhdari bhara rasta nikal rahi ho taaki bina kisi tension ke tumhari apni pehchaan zinda rahe.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Main apna phone toh kitchen mein use karti hi hoon recipes wagera ke liye. Usi bahane main kuch online articles ya short professional courses padh sakti hoon apne field ke baare mein. Kisi ko pata bhi nahi chalega aur main updated rahungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the shift from being entirely isolated and helpless to feeling a quiet sense of hope and agency.
text: Lagta hai us bandish aur lachari ke beech bhi, ab tumhe apne phone aur is naye plan ke zariye ek umeed aur thodi si azaadi mehsoos ho rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: meri wajah se sasural mein kisi ka sar jhuke
text: Umeed toh zaroor jagi hai aaj aapse baat karke. Mujhe ab ye realize ho gaya hai ki main sirf ek unpaid maid nahi hoon is ghar ki. Bhale hi abhi main 'meri wajah se sasural mein kisi ka sar jhuke' wala dar thoda thoda feel karti hoon, par main apna poora astitva nahi mitaungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a final systemic reframe on how preserving her identity is her right, despite the enduring societal conditioning.
text: Tumhara yeh sochna bahut theek hai, kyunki izzat aur divorce stigma ka darr dikha kar auraton ko chup karwana ek puraana tarika hai, par in sab ke beech apne wajood aur astitva ko sambhal kar rakhna tumhara ek buniyadi haq hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haq toh poora hai mera. Main aaj dopehar wala terrace ka plan toh pakka karungi hi, aur kitchen mein online kuch padhne ka bhi try karungi. Thoda waqt lagega mujhe is stigma wale dar se nikalne mein, but ab thodi shanti mil rahi hai andar se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens C to reflect how she is balancing relational harmony with her personal commitment to self.
text: Tum us rishte aur parivar ke dabav ko abhi samajh bhi rahi ho, lekin is baar tum uske andar dabne ke bajaye apna wajood banaye rakhne ki poori taiyari mein dikh rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi pakda aapne. Aisa nahi hai ki main marriage ya rishta todna chahti hoon. Main sabke sath mil kar hi rehna chahti hoon, but I won't lose myself entirely. Main aaj sham ko apne ek purane colleague ko hi-hello ka message karungi WhatsApp par, just to stay in touch.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking a future-focused question about how reaching out to her old network will support her.
text: Apne purane colleague se dobara contact karna ek bahut positive kadam lag raha hai, kya tumhe lagta hai unse baat karke tumhe apne kaam wale dino ki ek achi yaad aur aage badhne ka sahas milega?

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bilkul. Unse baat karke mujhe realize hoga ki duniya sirf is chula-chauka tak limited nahi hai. Meri professional field abhi bhi aage chal rahi hai aur main kabhi bhi active ho sakti hoon wapas, jab halaat thode aur favourable hon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens D to mirror the realization that her long pause in career doesn't mean the end of her professional journey.
text: Ek lambe samay tak khud ko kamre aur rasoi tak seemit rakhne ke baad, ab tumhe yeh ehsaas ho raha hai ki tumhara career aur bahar ki duniya ka rasta hamesha tumhare intezaar mein khula hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul khula hai. Main sabar ke sath wait karungi right time ka. Tab tak main apni mental well-being par dhyan dungi aur chhoti chhoti chizon mein azaadi dhundungi. Izzat aur sar jhukne wale dar se mujhe apne hi andar marne ki koi zarurat nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a strong validating statement to praise her courage in finding freedom within boundaries.
text: Khud ke liye aisi azaadi dhoondhna aur apne wajood ko aham maanna sach mein qabil-e-tareef hai, khaas karke un halaat mein jahan parivar aapse sirf khamoshi aur compromise ki ummeed rakhta ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you itna patience se meri baatein sunne ke liye. Aksar logo se baat karo toh unko lagta hai ki main bahut lucky hoon ki pati kamata hai aur mujhe bas ghar dekhna hai. Par aapne mere asli dard ko bina kisi judgement ke samjha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using Lens B to summarize her journey from fulfilling an imposed role to finding her voice.
text: Bahar se ek set parivar ki zindagi aur andar ki is rozz-marra ki kashmakash ke beech, tumne aakhirkar apne haq aur apni awaz ko dhoondh hi liya hai, aur is safar mein aage bhi hum hamesha yahan tumhare sath hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Parivaar ki shaan bachane ke liye main apni awaaz daba leti hoon
text: Parivaar ki shaan bachane ke liye main apni awaaz daba leti hoon. Raat-raat bhar ghabrahat hoti hai, neend nahi aati, par Doctor bolte hain bas relax karo. Unhe kya pata ki child pressure aur career ki bali chadhane ka bojh kaisa hota hai. Samaj kya kahega, sab yahi bolte hain ki bahu swarthi ho gayi hai, bachon par dhyan nahi de rahi. Hamare yahan aurat ka farz sirf sacrifice karna hi bataya gaya hai, aur main bas chupchap sab seh rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the relational pressure of sacrificing her voice to maintain the family's honor.
text: Aisa lag raha hai ki sabko khush rakhne aur samaj ke taano se bachne ke chakkar mein, aapko apne andar ki baatein aur apne career ki chahat ko poori tarah se chhupana pad raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, kyunki agar maine office ka kaam zyada der tak kiya toh saas-sasur ki izzat par sawal uthne lagte hain. Mere office ke targets bhi hain, par unhe lagta hai main sirf apne baare mein soch rahi hoon. Main apne aap ko hi blame karne lagti hoon ki shayad main hi achi bahu nahi ban pa rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the dual duty roles of office work and traditional family expectations.
text: Ek taraf office ke targets poore karne ki zimmedari aur doosri taraf ghar ki ek aadarsh bahu banne ka dabav, in dono bhumikaon mein khud ko sabit karte karte aap thak rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Parivaar ki shaan bachane ke liye main apni awaaz daba leti hoon
text: Bohot zyada thak gayi hoon. Kabhi kabhi toh ro deti hoon akele mein. Parivaar ki shaan bachane ke liye main apni awaaz daba leti hoon, kyuki janti hoon koi nahi samjhega. Sabko lagta hai aurat ka farz yahi hai, toh meri mehnat ki koi value hi nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the feared consequence that speaking up will only lead to being misunderstood and devalued.
text: Aapke shabdon se mehsus hota hai ki agar aapne apne liye awaz uthai, toh aapko darr hai ki poori family aapko samajh nahi payegi aur parivar mein sirf kalesh ho jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kalesh toh confirm hai. Pados ki biradari wali aunties aakar bolti hain ki 'bahu toh laptop mein hi lagi rehti hai, pota kab khilaoge'. Mujhe itna darr lagta hai ki in sab ke taane aur dabav mein kahin main sach mein pagal toh nahi ho jaungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a soft restatement ending in a pause to hold space for the stigma around mental well-being.
text: Sabke is lagatar aate huye dabav ne aapko akele pan mein itna dara diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Husband bhi kehte hain ki 'jab sab bol rahe hain toh thoda adjust kar lo, family planning pe dhyan dete hain'. Unhe meri promotions aur office ki mehnat se koi matlab nahi. Mujhe lagta hai main bilkul akeli pad gayi hoon is ghar mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the ongoing duration of being unsupported and suppressing her identity.
text: Itne waqt se rozana ye sab sunte huye aur husband se bhi support na milne par, aap lagatar apni pehchaan ko daba rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Parivaar ki shaan bachane ke liye main apni awaaz daba leti hoon
text: Bilkul daba rahi hoon. Jab maine apna pehla IT project successfully deliver kiya tha, main kitni khush thi. Par ab yahan Parivaar ki shaan bachane ke liye main apni awaaz daba leti hoon. Mera career bas ek formality ban gaya hai jo kisi ko nahi dikhta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the exact unexpressed emotion (ISOLATION) triggered by Gender Role Conflict + Relational Preservation.
text: Lagta hai ki is lagatar sacrifice aur dusron ki izzat rakhne ke bojh tale aap bohot ISOLATION mehsoos kar rahi hain, jaise kisi ko aapki asli chahat dikhai hi nahi de rahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi me kisi ko nahi dikhti. Office me boss kehta hai tum WFH me focus loose kar rahi ho, aur ghar me saas kehti hain 'aurat ka farz' ghar sambhalna hai. Main dono jagah fail ho rahi hoon aur is baat ka itna guilty feel hota hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her guilt and isolation as culturally normal for working women in the Hindi Belt navigating strict family expectations.
text: Tumhara is tarah se phasa hua aur guilty mehsoos karna bilkul swabhavik hai. Hamare samaj mein working women ke upar izzat aur parivaar ki demands ka bojh itna zyada hota hai ki unka apna career secondary ban jata hai, aur yeh aapki galti nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Lekin fir bhi bura toh lagta hi hai na. Aisa lagta hai ki kitni bhi mehnat kar lo, aakhir mein society ek aurat ko uske bachon aur rasoi se hi judge karti hai. Main physically aur mentally poori tarah drain ho chuki hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing the pressure through an anecdote about the invisible struggles of working daughters-in-law.
text: Working women mein apne career ki bali chadha kar parivaar ko aage rakhne ka pattern bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein achhi bahu kahlaane ka dabav sabse upar hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aap sahi keh rahe ho. Koi doosri aurat bhi aakar nahi bolti, sab apni apni ladaai akele lad rahi hain. Biradari mein bas yahi dikhana hota hai ki sab perfect chal raha hai aur main bohot sukhi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting on the exhaustion of maintaining a perfect relational facade.
text: Sabko dikhane ke chakkar mein ki ghar mein sab theek aur perfect hai, aap sabko apni ek khushnuma aur samarpit jhalak dikhane par majboor hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji. Lekin ab mujhse aur jhela nahi ja raha. Main abhi sab kuch toh nahi chhod sakti, par main is ghutan se theek hona chahti hoon. Aap hi batao kya karoon, jisse meri shanti wapas aaye aur rishte bhi na bigdein?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, low-conflict actions to reclaim personal space without directly challenging family structures.
text: Aapke is bojhal mahol mein thodi rahat ke liye hum do chhoti cheezein try kar sakte hain. Pehla, apne office login karne se 10 minute pehle akele chai pite hue sirf apna koi pasandida gaana sunna. Dusra, apne laptop bag mein ek chhoti diary rakhna jisme aap office ki apni choti achievements chupchap likh sakein bina kisi aur ko dikhaye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Parivaar ki shaan bachane ke liye main apni awaaz daba leti hoon
text: Diary wala idea mujhe theek lag raha hai. Par chai wale time ka sochu toh wo zyada aasan lagta hai roz ke liye. Parivaar ki shaan bachane ke liye main apni awaaz daba leti hoon, par kam se kam wo 10 minute mere apne toh honge rasoi mein jaane se pehle.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking through the chosen option of 10 minutes of morning tea step-by-step.
text: Chaliye fir usi aasan wale chai ke step se shuruwat karte hain. Pehle subah jaldi uth kar rasoi ka kaam shuru karne se theek pehle, apne liye sirf 10 minute alag baith kar apni pasand ka kuch suniye… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main apni headphones laga kar thodi der balcony mein baith sakti hoon us time. Wahan biradari ya saas ki nazrein nahi padengi mujh par. Sirf 10 minute nikalna toh shayad itna mushkil nahi hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting on the safety of the balcony as a place free from the fear of being judged.
text: Us choti si balcony mein headphones laga kar, aap is darr se thoda azaad mehsoos kar payengi ki koi aapko observe kar raha hai ya taana maarne wala hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Jab koi mujhe dekhta nahi hai, tabhi main actually saans le paati hoon. Warna toh har waqt ek performance deni padti hai ki dekho, main kitni achi bahu hoon aur mera sab control mein hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the exhaustion of the continuous duty performance.
text: Bina ruke ek perfect bhumika nibhane ka yeh acting wala kaam aapko andar hi andar lagatar thakata chala ja raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach mein. Pehle mujhe coding bohot pasand thi. Ab laptop screen dekhte hi mujhe WFH wali saari responsibility yaad aati hai. Par main in cheezon se bhag nahi sakti, aakhir ghar toh mujhe hi sambhalna padega na?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing the sense of failing at multiple duties as a broader structural issue faced by women, not a personal flaw.
text: Hamare samaj ki banawat hi aisi hai jahan working women ko dual burden jhelna padta hai, aur yeh 'sab mujhe hi sambhalna padega' wali feeling structural dabav ka hissa hai, aapki koi niji nakami nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh samajhna thoda tasalli deta hai. Mujhe yahi lagta tha ki main hi weak hoon. Agar sab hi working ladies ko yeh dual burden uthana padta hai, toh shayad main pagal nahi ho rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her resilience against the heavy cultural pressure.
text: Aap bilkul bhi pagal nahi ho rahi hain, balki aap bohot mazbooti se ek bohot mushkil situation ka samna kar rahi hain. Apni limits aur is bojh ko pehchaanna samajhdari hai, na ki kamzori.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: Parivaar ki shaan bachane ke liye main apni awaaz daba leti hoon
text: Thank you. Mujhe kisi ki reassurance ki zaroorat thi. Parivaar ki shaan bachane ke liye main apni awaaz daba leti hoon, iska ye matlab nahi ki mere andar ki aurat ka wajood mit gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting how she separates her suppressed voice from her surviving sense of self-worth.
text: Apne rishton ki khaatir aapne bhale hi thodi chuppi sadh li ho, lekin aapne apne astitva aur apne kaam ke prati samman ko marne nahi diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Nahi marne dungi. Maine apne maa baap ka paisa lagwa kar padhai ki hai. Main child pressure aur in-laws ke taane sun lungi, par kam se kam apni job nahi chhodungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her determination to honor her long-term educational efforts.
text: Aapki is lambi mehnat aur padhai ke safar ne aapko itna kaabil banaya hai ki aap itna kuch sehne ke bawajood apne career ko chhodna nahi chahti hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji. Aur jo aapne subah ke 10 minute chai wala idea diya tha, main wo pakka karungi. Shayad us 10 minute mein main bas apne purane zindadil roop mein rahungi, na kisi ki bahu aur na employee.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing small moments of detachment as highly effective survival strategies in restrictive environments.
text: Din bhar ke is bojh ke beech thoda sa akelepan ka samay lena, aise sakht parivarik mahol mein ghutan se bachne ka ek chhota aur prabhavi raasta ban jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai. Abhi mujhe lagta hai ki kam se kam mere paas ek plan toh hai, ek chota sa step jo sirf mera apna hoga. Pata nahi isse sasural wale badlenge ya nahi, par main andar se shant rahungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting on how the feared consequence of them not changing has lost its power over her inner peace.
text: Bahar ke mahol ke na badalne ka darr ab aapko pehle jaisa pareshan nahi kar raha kyunki aapne apne andar shanti dhoondhne ka raasta nikal liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Ghabrahat abhi bhi thodi hai, par ab wo utni haavi nahi hai mujh par. Main kal se hi apni 10 minute wali chai se shuruwat karungi bina kisi aur ko pareshan kiye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closing warmly by affirming her practical solution and validating her quiet strength.
text: Mujhe aapki is chhoti par bohot taqatwar koshish par poora vishwas hai. Jab bhi aap akele woh chai piyengi, yaad rakhna ki aap ek bohot mazboot working woman hain jo apni pehchaan poori himmat se zinda rakh rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apni saari ambition ko maar kar bas ek silent homemaker bani rehti hoon taaki ghar ki izzat bani rahe
text: Doctor ne phir symptoms ko halke mein liya, par ye ghutan toh career chhod kar ghar ki chaar-diwari mein qaid hone ki wajah se hai. Main Saas ke samne career ki baat nahi chhedti kyunki rishta tootne ka darr lagta hai aur main nahi chahti ki log meri maa ko taane dein. Unki khushi ke liye main apni saari ambition ko maar kar bas ek silent homemaker bani rehti hoon taaki ghar ki izzat bani rahe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the immense relational responsibility she has taken on to protect her family's peace.
text: Aapko apni maa aur saas dono ke rishton ko bachane ki poori zimmedari akele uthani pad rahi hai, jiske chalte aapne apne sapne daba diye hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, sach mein. Mere liye sabse bada darr hai ki log meri maa pe ungli uthayenge ki unhone achhi parvarish nahi ki. Agar main apni job ke liye stand lungi, toh ghar mein kalesh hoga. Isliye bas andar hi andar ghut-ti rehti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the paralyzing fear of bringing societal shame onto her mother.
text: Ye darr ki aapke kisi bhi aage badhne wale step se seedha aapki maa ko taane sunne padenge, isne aapko wahi rok rakha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul yahi baat hai. Jab maine shadi ke baad company chhori thi, mujhe laga tha thode din mein shanti hone par part-time kuch kar lungi. Par ab lagta hai ye chaar-diwari hi meri kismat ban gayi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Inviting her to explore the emotional weight of this ongoing invisible sacrifice.
text: Itni badi kurbani dene ke baad bhi jab us part-time kaam ki ummeed dhundhli padne lagti hai, toh us waqt aapke andar kya chal raha hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Aisa lagta hai jaise main exist hi nahi karti. Meri pehchan bas itni reh gayi hai ki main ek achhi bahu hoon. Main sabke bich rehti hoon par andar se bilkul akeli pad gayi hoon. Kisi ko meri career ambition se koi lena-dena nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the specific profound isolation generated by hiding her true identity to preserve relations.
text: Lagta hai in sabhi umeedon aur parivaar ki izzat ke bojh ke beech, aap ek gehri ISOLATION aur akelepan se guzar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Par kya main galat hoon? Ek homemaker hona koi buri baat toh nahi hai na. Shayad main hi selfish aur self-centered ho rahi hoon apne baare mein soch kar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Holding space for the stigma cue without rushing to fix, honoring the duration of the distress.
text: Pichle kuch waqt se aap is kashmakash mein hain ki ab khud ki soch par hi sawal uthane lagi hain...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apni saari ambition ko maar kar bas ek silent homemaker bani rehti hoon taaki ghar ki izzat bani rahe
text: Haan, kafi time ho gaya khud ko koste hue. Par sachai yehi hai ki apni saari ambition ko maar kar bas ek silent homemaker bani rehti hoon taaki ghar ki izzat bani rahe. Ye dikhawa ab mentally asaan nahi hai mere liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the structural burden on working women adjusting to homemaker roles.
text: Yeh self-doubt aana bahut swabhavik hai, kyunki humare yahan aksar betiyon aur bahuon ko sikhaya jata hai ki unki khushi se upar ghar ki izzat hai. Apne career aur pehchan ki chah rakhna koi selfish baat nahi hai, yeh ek valid zarurat hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sun kar thoda aaram mila. Mujhe lagta tha sirf main hi itni ungrateful hoon apni family ke liye. Din bhar ghar ka kaam karti hoon, aur raat ko wahi ghutan aati hai ki meri padhai aur degree bas raddi ban kar reh gayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a brief systemic anecdote to normalize the identity conflict for women in traditional setups.
text: Shaadi ke baad professionals ki zindagi mein ye akelepan aur identity khone ka dar bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bahar bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein 'sushil bahu' ka image sabse zaruri mana jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ekdum sach baat hai. Aur mujhe yeh silent sacrifice wala image ab aur maintain nahi karna, kam se kam is health ki qeemat par toh nahi. Mujhe is ghutan se nikalna hai, kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka... aap batao kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, bounded options to reconnect with her professional identity without triggering family conflict.
text: Jab poori tarah se career start karna abhi risk lag raha ho, toh 2 chote raste dekh sakte hain. Kya aap din ke 20 minute apni purani field ki updates padhne mein nikal sakti hain? Ya phir, koi online chhota freelance project explore kar sakti hain jisme aap ghar par hi rahein?

speaker: Seeker
text: Freelance project explore karna thoda better lag raha hai, isse actually thoda active feel hoga. Par uske liye bhi mujhe laptop pe time bitana padega daily. Saas puchegi ki kya kar rahi ho toh main kya kahungi?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Breaking down the suggestion into a safe, manageable first step.
text: Pehle aap sirf aaj 30 minute laptop open karke dekhiye aur agar pucha jaye toh 'ek chhota online course ya nayi recipe ki class' jaisa neutral jawab de sakti hain… phir dheere dheere time badhayenge… bas itna hi aaj ke liye try kijiye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh feasible hai. Agar main directly kaam ya job ka naam nahi lungi toh shuru mein unhe utni problem nahi hogi. Ek baar ye naya routine ban gaya toh sayad unhe meri aadat ho jaye screen par dekhne ki.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reframing systemic change as something that requires gradual structural adaptation rather than sudden confrontation.
text: Aksar family structures mein naye routines asani se tab accept hote hain jab hum structural tarike se bina kisi direct argument ke, dheere-dheere apna ek chhota space create karte hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apni saari ambition ko maar kar bas ek silent homemaker bani rehti hoon taaki ghar ki izzat bani rahe
text: Sahi baat hai. Main chahti hoon ki meri pehchan bache aur maa ki izzat pe bhi aanch na aaye. Lekin kabhi lagta hai main apni saari ambition ko maar kar bas ek silent homemaker bani rehti hoon taaki ghar ki izzat bani rahe, is aadat ne mujhe darrpok bana diya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her realization that her duty-bound silence has eroded her professional confidence.
text: Aapko lag raha hai ki aadarsh beti aur bahu ki duty nibhate nibhate aap apne haq ke liye aawaz uthane ka wo purana confidence kho chuki hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, confidence toh almost zero ho gaya hai. Ek time pe main team lead karti thi office mein. Ab market me sabzi waale se bhi bargain karte hue lagta hai ki pata nahi theek se kar rahi hoon ya nahi. Ye badlav bahut bhari hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the profound impact of time away from her skills.
text: Itne lambe arse se apne leadership skills ko istemaal na kar pane ki wajah se aapka khud ki qabiliyat par bharosa dagmaga gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Par aaj lag raha hai ki wo team lead abhi bhi andar kahin zinda hai. Freelancing ke ek chote project se hi shuru karungi, shayad wo confidence wapas aana shuru ho jaye dheere dheere.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompting her to connect with the positive feeling of reclaiming her identity.
text: Jab aap us purani team lead wali capability ko dobara apne andar mehsus karti hain, toh wo ehsaas kaisa lagta hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Wo ehsaas bahut empowering hota hai. Us waqt koi ghutan nahi lagti. Par agle hi pal saas ki aawaz sun kar fir wahi dar waapas aa jata hai ki unhe pata chal gaya toh kya hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the persistent push-and-pull between her empowerment and her feared consequence of family disruption.
text: Ek taraf apni pehchan wapas pane ki kushi hai, aur theek uske sath ye darr hamesha juda hai ki family mein kalesh ho jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, wo darr itna real hai na. Log actually maa ko hi kahenge 'dekho isne adjustment nahi sikhaya apni beti ko'. Aur meri maa heart patient hai, main unhe waqai tension nahi de sakti.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her protective instinct while separating her self-worth from the societal expectations placed on daughters.
text: Aapko apni maa ki health ko lekar chinta aur ye darr mehsoos hona laazmi hai, humare yahan 'log kya kahenge' ka saara dabaav betiyon par hi aata hai. Par aapka apne kaam ki chah rakhna aur unki care karna—dono baatein valid hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Wo dono baatein alag hain. Main dono ko smarth tareeke se manage kar sakti hoon. Jaise maine pehle bhi tough clients aur pressure handle kiya hai corporate mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her successful integration of her professional identity into managing her current family role.
text: Aap us purane corporate experience ki himmat ko ab is ghar ke role wale pressure ko handle karne mein istemaal karna chahti hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apni saari ambition ko maar kar bas ek silent homemaker bani rehti hoon taaki ghar ki izzat bani rahe
text: Haan. Main is issue ko ek project ki tarah dekhungi. Kyunki 'apni saari ambition ko maar kar bas ek silent homemaker bani rehti hoon taaki ghar ki izzat bani rahe' wali approach ab aur nahi chalegi mere liye. Mujhe smarter play karna hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reinforcing the effectiveness of approaching family change strategically rather than reactively.
text: Is tarah dhire-dhire naye routines ko as a strategic project implement karne se ghar ki dynamics naturally shift hone lagti hain, bina kisi sudden disturbance ke.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi baat hai. Sab kuch ek din mein change nahi ho sakta, aur achanak karne se shock lag jayega sabko ghar mein. Main wo half hour wale step par hi dhyaan dungi abhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her careful preservation of the family relations while asserting herself.
text: Pariwar walo ko us achanak badlav ke jhatke se bachane ke liye hi aap isko chote aur aaramdayak steps mein badal rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, maa aur saas ko dhire dhire aadat dalni padegi meri is nayi routine ki. Aur mujhe bhi thoda khud ko alag rakhna padega unke daily taano se, har baat ko dil par nahi le sakti main.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the shift from suffocation to a renewed sense of hope and clarity.
text: In nayi shuruaat ke baare mein sochne bhar se lagta hai ki aapke andar ki pehle wali ghutan ab kaafi kam ho gayi hai aur ek fresh umeed ne jagah le li hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ghutan definitely kaafi kam hui hai aaj baat karke. Pehli baar lag raha hai ki mera issue genuine tha, aur iska rasta bhi ahista se nikal sakta hai. Shukriya meri itni lambaai se sunne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a final, low-barrier anchor for continued emotional safety.
text: Aapka yahan aakar apne man ka bojh halka karna bahut himmat ka kaam tha. Agar phir kabhi us chaar-diwari ke akelepan ka bojh badhne lage, toh wapas baat karne ka option hamesha khula rakhna, ya din mein bas 5 minute likhne ki aadat aap try kar sakti hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apne sapno ka gala ghot kar main sabka khayal rakhti hoon
text: Doctor ne palpitations ko stress bataya, par ye toh woh darr hai ki main kabhi apni khoi hui pehchaan wapas nahi paaungi. Main chup rehti hoon kyunki sasural mein ladkiyon ko jhukna padta hai aur main kaleshi bahu nahi banna chahti. Apne sapno ka gala ghot kar main sabka khayal rakhti hoon taaki khandaan ki shaan par koi aanch na aaye aur sab khush rahein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To mirror the relational obligation of maintaining family honor while suppressing her own identity using Lens C.
text: Khandaan ki shaan aur parivaar ki khushi banaye rakhne ki is koshish mein, tumhe lag raha hai ki tum apni pehchaan aur apne sapno ko poori tarah se kho rahi ho...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Haan, aur is dikhawe mein main andar se bilkul thak chuki hoon. Roz subah uthti hoon toh lagta hai fir wahi ghisa-pita din. Sabki pasand ka khana, sabki aadat... meri pasand kisi ko yaad bhi nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To reflect the feared consequence of asserting her needs using Lens E.
text: Agar tumne galti se bhi apni pasand ya zaroorat aage rakh di, toh tumhe darr lagta hai ki sasural wale tumhe kaleshi bahu samajh lenge aur ghar ki shanti bhang ho jayegi...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Bilkul! Zara sa mooh khola nahi ki taane shuru. Padosiyon aur rishtedaron mein baatein banne lagengi. Main nahi chahti ki mere mayke walon tak baat jaye aur biradari mein unki izzat mitti mein mile.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To acknowledge the stigma gently without questioning, mirroring the duration of this burden using Lens D.
text: Itne lambe samay se tumne mayke ki izzat bachane ke us bojh ko chupchap akele hi utha rakha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apne sapno ka gala ghot kar main sabka khayal rakhti hoon
text: Bojh toh hai. Apne sapno ka gala ghot kar main sabka khayal rakhti hoon, par phir akelepan mein rona nikal aata hai. Aisa lagta hai ki is ghar mein meri bas naukrani jaisi value hai, insaan jaisi nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To name the unexpressed feeling of isolation stemming from her relational preservation.
text: Lagta hai ki is kaleshi bahu ke tag se bachne aur rishte nibhane ki koshish mein tumne khud ko apne hi ghar mein ek gehre akelepan aur isolation mein dhakel diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Ekdum akele... mere paas toh koi baat karne wala bhi nahi hai. Jo sakhiyaan thi shadi se pehle, sab chhoot gayi. Ab toh kabhi kabhi itni thakan hoti hai ki lagta hai main kyun hi jee rahi hoon? Saans lena bhi bhaari lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To safely hold the moderate risk by mirroring the duty and exhaustion using Lens B and asking a direct safety question.
text: Sabki zarooraton ko poora karte karte aur apni identity dabaate hue, achanak sab kuch itna khaali aur bekaar lagne laga hai. Yeh sun ke dil bhaari ho gaya. Kya tum abhi theek ho?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Haan, main theek hoon. Bas wo thakan itni hadd tak badh jati hai ki dimag sunn pad jata hai. Main khud ko koi nuksaan nahi pahuchaungi, akhir mere maa-baap ka kya hoga. Par ye ghutan kaise kam ho?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To validate her exhaustion as normal within the cultural expectations of her household while separating her worth from their judgment.
text: Tumhara is ghutan aur akelepan se thak jana is sasural wale maahaul mein bilkul swabhavik hai, lekin tumhari ahmiyat is baat se decide nahi hoti ki log tumhe kitna jhuka sakte hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apne sapno ka gala ghot kar main sabka khayal rakhti hoon
text: Ahmiyat toh chhod hi dijiye. Kabhi kabhi toh lagta hai ladkiyon ko jhukna padta hai yahi sach man kar baith jaun. Apne sapno ka gala ghot kar main sabka khayal rakhti hoon, yahi meri kismet hai shayad. Par dil manta nahi hai puri tarah.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To normalize her burden by sharing a brief systemic anecdote about homemakers without offering a solution.
text: Ek aurat ki zindagi mein ghar parivar ki shanti ke liye apne sapne dafnana humare samaj mein bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki adarsh bahu ki chhavi sabse zaroori maani jati hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Wahi aadarsh bahu ka bojh mujhe daba raha hai. Lekin samajh nahi aata ki is chhavi ko tode bina main khud ko zinda kaise rakhun? Thoda sa sukoon chahti hoon bas, ab kya karoon koi rasta hai kya?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To offer two brief, low-friction suggestions to help her carve out personal space without disrupting her duties.
text: Jab aadarsh bahu ka bojh itna bhaari ho, toh do chhote raaste apna sakti ho. Pehla, jab sab dopahar mein aaram karein, toh 5 minute apne bachpan ki koi kitaab ya diary likhna. Dusra, aaina dekhte waqt bas 2 minute khud ki kisi ek achhi aadat ko yaad karna. Inme se kya theek lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Dopahar ko diary likhna theek lag raha hai. Kitab padhne par saas dekhengi toh kahengi ki ghar ka kaam chhod kar kya timepass kar rahi hai. Par diary main chupchap apne kamre mein likh sakti hoon jab sab so rahe hon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To guide her through implementing the diary suggestion step by step.
text: Thoda waqt apne nikaalne ke liye pehle yeh karo… dopahar ko jab sab so jayein toh ek chhoti diary nikalo… uspe sirf apne mann ki ek achhi baat likho… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Haan, ye main kar sakti hoon. Isse kisi ki shanti bhi bhang nahi hogi aur khandaan ki shaan bhi barkarar rahegi. Kam se kam us 5 minute mein main kisi ki bahu nahi, sirf main rahungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To normalize her exhaustion as a structural burden imposed on homemakers rather than a personal failing.
text: Aurton se lagataar yeh umeed karna ki wo bina thake khushi se sab sambhalein ek bahot bada dabaav hai, aur is pressure se aane wali thakan tumhari kamzori nahi balki in expectations ka asar hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Ye baat sach hai. Mere aas-paas ki saari aurtein yehi kar rahi hain. Sabne samjhauta kiya hai. Aur ye maan kar ki ye society ke system ka nateeja hai, mujhe lag raha hai jaise mere kandhon se do kilo bojh kam ho gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To mirror the relief she feels upon reframing her struggles structurally using Lens D.
text: Pichle itne saalon se jise tum apni nakaami samajh kar kos rahi thi, use ab ek system ka hissa samajhna tumhe thodi rahat de raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apne sapno ka gala ghot kar main sabka khayal rakhti hoon
text: Rahat toh mili hai. Pehle lagta tha ki main hi nakhre kar rahi hoon. Apne sapno ka gala ghot kar main sabka khayal rakhti hoon, toh mujhe appreciate kyun nahi karte. Ab samajh aaya unki nazar mein ye toh bas mera farz hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To validate her insight into her situation and commend her inner resilience.
text: Apne khud ke kiye gaye compromises ko itni gehrai se dekh paana aur in umeedon ke beech apni samajh ko zinda rakhna, tumhari bohot badi taqat hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Shukriya... Pehli baar lag raha hai ki kisi ne mujhe waise samjha jaisi main andar se hoon. Par abhi bhi jab sham ko saas ka paara chadhta hai toh heartbeats tez ho jati hain. Palpitations wapas aa jate hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To mirror the feared consequence of unpredictable evening tensions using Lens E.
text: Shaam ke waqt jab achanak mahaul garm hota hai, toh yeh darr ki ab kisi bahane se tumhe hi target kiya jayega, tumhari ghabrahat ko ekdam se bada deta hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Haan, us waqt lagta hai ki bas chhup jaun kahin. Kyunki agar maine safai di toh main badtameez aur kaleshi bahu kehlaungi. Toh main chuppi saadh leti hoon aur andar hi andar jal bin machhli jaisi tadapti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To explore how she grounds herself during moments of acute helplessness.
text: Jab wo tadap itni zyada ho jati hai aur chuppi saadhnay ki majboori hoti hai, tab us ghabrahat ke pallon ko jhelne ke liye tumhara dhyan kahan jata hai?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Mera dhyan mere mayke chala jata hai. Sochti hoon wahan kitni azaad thi main. Phir yaad aati hai maa ki seekh ki ladkiyon ko jhukna padta hai. Phir dhyan wapas rasoi ki taraf laga leti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To mirror the relational pull between her past freedom and current duty using Lens C.
text: Maa ki us seekh aur izzat ki fikar ke chalte, tum apne sukoon aur purani azaadi ki yadon ko wahin chhod kar fir se ghar ke kamo mein lagne ko majboor ho jati ho...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Majboori hi toh hai ye. But at least ab thoda halkapan lag raha hai ki main apne dimag mein toh apna wajood zinda rakh sakti hoon na? Diary likhne wala idea sach mein ek sahara lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To highlight the emerging sense of relief and hope in preserving her identity safely.
text: Lagta hai ki is majboori bhare maahaul ke beech, khud ki pehchaan ko diary ke panno mein mehfooz rakhne ka khayal tumhe akelepan se nikaal kar ek choti si rahat de raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: apne sapno ka gala ghot kar main sabka khayal rakhti hoon
text: Bahot badi rahat! Apne sapno ka gala ghot kar main sabka khayal rakhti hoon, ye baat maine likh li kal. Likhne ke baad rona aaya, par phir laga ki kam se kam maine sach toh bola.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To validate her courage in expressing her truth privately.
text: Apne sach ko panno par utaar paana aur apne dard ko mahsoos karne ki himmat jutana ek swabhavik process hai, aur tumne bina kisi aur ko dukhi kiye apne liye kitna sundar rasta nikaala hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Thank you ye samajhne ke liye. Log toh kehte hain ki achhe ghar mein shadi hui hai, koi kami nahi. Par jo ghutan andar hai, wo soney ke pinjare jaisi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To validate her emotional needs structurally, reinforcing that physical comfort doesn't negate the need for respect.
text: Humare samaj mein aksar logo ko lagta hai ki roti aur chhat hi kafi hai, par ek insaan ko aatm-samman aur izzat ki bhi utni hi zaroorat hoti hai, aur is kami ko mehsus karna tumhara haq hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Sahi baat hai. Aatm-samman hi toh sabsay zyada chahiye. Main sasural ke raste nahi badal sakti ek din mein, par main poori koshish karungi ki apna aatm-samman diary mein zinda rakhu.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To mirror her determination to maintain her internal resilience over time using Lens D.
text: Aage aane wale kal mein sasural ko badalne ki jagah, tum khud ko andar se majboot aur zinda rakhne ka ek naya aur thos irada bana chuki ho...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: null
text: Jee, ab main itni thaki hui aur majboor nahi mehsus kar rahi. Mujhe pata hai mujhe apne liye kaise choti-choti jeet dhoondhni hai taaki aage ka safar thoda asaan ho sake.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: To close by validating her strength in finding small victories despite the difficult environment.
text: Tumhara us lachari se bahar aakar apne liye chhote chhote sukoon dhoondhne ka yeh jazba waqayi kaabile tareef hai, aur tumne apne andar ek bahut taqatvar jagah bana li hai.
